chunks.title: CSS Position Property
chunks.text: In CSS, there is a very important property called Position.  Suppose you want to move an element from its previous position,  then you can use position relative to create a top 3 pixel and that 3 pixel will come down.  Similarly, by using position property and z-index, you can keep the elements on top of each other.  How all these things are done in CSS?

chunks.title: CSS Position Property
chunks.text: In this video, we are going to understand.  Do write Sigma Batch OPi in the comment section below.  And keep this high energy.  Let's go to the computer screen.  Let's roll the intro.

I will put 4.  Box1, I gave one class, I will give one box2 class, I will give one box3 class, I will give one box4 class.
